## Summary

What changed and why?

## Linked issue / plan

Closes #...
Relates to plan: `design/plans/...`

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run --extra dev pytest`)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] If this changes a design decision, a decision file under
      `design/decisions/` has been added or updated
- [ ] Commit messages follow the conventional-commits style used in the
      project (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] No emoji or unrelated changes mixed in

## Testing notes

How did you exercise this change beyond the unit tests? (Smoke run, edge case
you hit, etc.)
